# Eduard James - Portfolio Landing Page

A professional, animated portfolio built with React, TypeScript, and Framer Motion.

## Project Setup Complete ✓

### Tech Stack
- React 18 + TypeScript
- Framer Motion (animations)
- Tailwind CSS (styling)
- Vite (dev server)

### Running the Project
```bash
npm run dev
```
Access at: http://localhost:5173/

### Features Implemented
- [x] Fixed Navigation with smooth scrolling
- [x] Animated Hero Section with gradients
- [x] About Section with profile
- [x] Skills Categories (Frontend, Backend, Tools, Soft Skills)
- [x] Projects Portfolio (4 sample projects)
- [x] Contact Form
- [x] Footer with social links
- [x] Fully Responsive Design
- [x] Smooth Framer Motion Animations

### Next Steps to Customize
1. Update personal information in components
2. Add real project descriptions
3. Connect contact form to email service
4. Replace emoji icons with actual images
5. Add social media links
6. Deploy to Vercel or Netlify

### Build for Production
```bash
npm run build
npm run preview
```
